mergeQuestions: Q-merge-1: does codex-xhigh confirm/contradict the read-reliability matrix (OpenCode/Codex hook + AGENTS.md decay)?
Q-merge-2: do both lineages rank the same top cluster (governor-on-hook / mutation-check / recursion-control)?
Q-merge-3: did either lineage surface a surface×delta this one missed? union then re-dedup vs round 1
Q-merge-4: tier-A budget check — AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md twins stay under ~500 lines after a doctrine-spine addition?
resolvedQuestions: Q1 (EXTRACT-1): 15 net-new fable-5 techniques from fable-mode-main (iter 1)
Q3 (SURFACE MAP): read-reliability matrix across OpenCode/Claude/Codex (iter 3)
Q4 (OPTIMIZE): 11 ranked surface×delta recs, tiered A/B/C, deduped vs round 1 (iter 4)
Q5 (FOLLOW-UPS + GAPS): both carried follow-ups still-open; rec #12; gaps + merge questions (iter 5)

rankedRecommendations.rec: Ride the live per-turn UserPromptSubmit hook with a compact fable-5 governor
Mutation-check / claim-falsifier discipline into sk-code verification
Recursion-control constitutional rule (reason-about-problem-not-yourself; depth-limit-1; caption test) + xhigh briefs
Engineer staleness out of artifacts (counts->greps, lists->table-walking tests); first apply to dead skill-advisor-hook.md pointer
Inject governor into agent prompt templates / renderPromptPack (subagent surface the hook is blind to)
Compact doctrine-spine line in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md §1 (root conviction + register/voice + letter-vs-intent), paired with #1
leak_test-style behavioral metric (tool:text, words/msg, caveat%, self-opener%) as /doctor or deep:*-benchmark
Scar-tissue + cold-successor handoff discipline into handover.md + _memory.continuity
Verification ladder with named pre-stated blind spots into sk-code/deep-review
Adversarial-review schema + machine-checkable evidence contract (= round-1 carried follow-up; dedicated packet)
Decision-economy + fail-closed-by-construction doctrine (named seam not TODO; never a dead control; reject not strip)
Fail-loud on model mismatch in executor-audit (= round-1 codex SIGKILL/silent-gpt-5 carried follow-up; dedicated packet)

keyFindings.title: Mutation-as-epistemology (mutation check; claim-falsifier; compile-RED vs true-RED)
Verification ladder with named pre-stated blind spots
Adversarial-review-at-scale + forced claim/verdict/evidence schema + completeness critic
Scar-tissue ledger (blast site + next-bite-site + load-bearing-vs-defensive + activation)
Cold-successor handoff protocol (carry only non-derivable; numbered Read order; ship next brief)
Engineer staleness out of artifacts (counts->greps, lists->table-walking tests)
Fail-closed by construction (structural not disciplinary invariants; reject not strip)
Decision economy: scope-frugal/process-expensive, named seam not bare TODO, never a dead control
Brief-sovereign letter-vs-intent dialectic; undocumented deviation is the sin
Two-register voice + signature lexicon + averted-disaster framing; no celebration/apology/flattery
Multi-agent house rules: LEAF disjoint-scope, git/.md ban, typed status enum, two-stage review, verify-personally backstop
Reproduce-before-fix + second-break-behind-first + suspect-yourself-first + throwaway instruments
Measurement integrity (untrustworthy number is a bug even when green)
Ration live/destructive actions; harnesses over production; cleanup as privacy ethic
Worst-first triage in named severity buckets (downstream consequence to cold reader)
Opus recursion-control governor (8 rules; reason-about-problem-not-yourself; audit depth-limit 1; commit with // DECISION:)
Three-layer persistence: setpoint(CLAUDE.md)->thermostat(UserPromptSubmit reinject)->measurement(leak_test); hook is SUBAGENT-BLIND, inject into agent briefs separately
leak_test.py harness: median words/msg, tool:text ratio, caveat%, self-opener% bucketed by model id from JSONL logs; verdict converging iff moved-toward AND closed-distance
Prompt-vs-weights honesty: governor steers style not capability; capability lever = task-structure (closed prompts) + multi-LLM orchestration
Quantified Fable signature: words 47->18, mean EQUAL (distribution not less), tool:text 1.41->3.91, result-first openers
Extended-thinking caption test: captions about the problem (healthy) vs about yourself (burning budget on self-surveillance)
Reject wrong framings/false dichotomies; lumpy-bit-not-armor-bit; outward turn (ask about their need)
Beautiful-dead-end guardrail + don't-overcorrect-into-curtness (govern the governor)
Anti-recursion self-check (one pass) + toggle (FABLE_MODE_OFF) + hook timeout 5 + new-session activation
